prompt.title: Salon Booking App Prompt
prompt.label: 🔥 The Full Prompt
prompt.heading: Config-Driven Salon Booking App — React + Vite
prompt.text:
You are building a config-driven salon booking web app using React + Vite.
It will be hosted on Cloudflare Pages. The backend will be connected later
(Hono + Cloudflare D1). For now use mock data and simulate all API calls
with a 800ms delay to mimic real network requests.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BUSINESS CONFIG  ←  single source of truth
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

// src/config.js
export default {
  brand: "Noir Salon",
  tagline: "Where style meets precision.",
  location: "Connaught Place, New Delhi",
  phone: "+91 98765 43210",
  instagram: "https://instagram.com/oye.nino",
  accent: "#f59e0b",
  accentSoft: "#fffbeb",
  accentDark: "#b45309",
  theme: "dark",               // "dark" | "light"
  slotDuration: 60,            // minutes
  services: [
    { id: "s1", name: "Haircut + Styling", duration: 60,  price: 599  },
    { id: "s2", name: "Beard Trim",        duration: 20,  price: 199  },
    { id: "s3", name: "Hair Colour",       duration: 90,  price: 999  },
    { id: "s4", name: "Combo Package",     duration: 90,  price: 1199 },
  ],
  workingHours: { start: "10:00", end: "20:00" },
  slotIntervalMinutes: 30,
};

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
TECH STACK
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

- React 18 + Vite
- No external UI library — pure inline styles or CSS modules
- No React Router — use useState for page/view transitions
- Pexels free images for salon photos (use direct CDN URLs, add
  "Photos by Pexels" attribution in footer)
- Google Fonts: Inter (weights 400, 500, 600, 700, 800)
- Zero npm packages beyond React + Vite + @vitejs/plugin-react
- All API calls go through a single src/api/bookings.js file
  (mock now, real fetch later — just swap the functions)
- Cloudflare Pages compatible — static build, no SSR

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PROJECT STRUCTURE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

src/
├── config.js                  ← business config (single source)
├── main.jsx
├── App.jsx                    ← view router (useState based)
├── api/
│   └── bookings.js            ← all API calls (mock for now)
├── pages/
│   ├── LandingPage.jsx        ← page 1
│   ├── BookingPage.jsx        ← page 2
│   ├── ConfirmationPage.jsx   ← page 3
│   └── SlotsUnavailable.jsx   ← page 4 (edge case)
├── components/
│   ├── Navbar.jsx
│   ├── ServiceCard.jsx
│   ├── SlotPicker.jsx
│   ├── BookingForm.jsx
│   └── Footer.jsx
└── utils/
    └── slots.js               ← slot generation logic

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PAGE 1 — LANDING PAGE (src/pages/LandingPage.jsx)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Sections (in order):
1. Navbar — logo (brand name + amber dot), fixed top, "Book Now" CTA button
2. Hero — full viewport height, Pexels salon background image with dark overlay,
   headline, subline, primary CTA button "Book your slot →"
3. Services — list all services from config with name, duration, price.
   Each card is tappable and navigates directly to BookingPage with that
   service pre-selected.
4. Gallery — 2-column grid, 4 Pexels salon/barbershop images
5. Why us — 3 USPs: Instant booking, Expert stylists, Transparent pricing
6. Bottom CTA — "Ready for your new look?" with Book button
7. Footer — brand name, location, phone, instagram link, "built with oye.nino."

Design rules:
- Background: #0a0a0a (near black)
- Text: #ffffff primary, rgba(255,255,255,0.5) secondary
- Accent: #f59e0b (amber)
- Section number eyebrows in monospace: "01 / services", "02 / our work"
- Rounded corners throughout (16px minimum)
- Smooth fade-in animations on section entry (use IntersectionObserver)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PAGE 2 — BOOKING PAGE (src/pages/BookingPage.jsx)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

3-step flow with a progress bar at the top (Step 1/3, 2/3, 3/3):

STEP 1 — Choose Service
- Show all services from config as selectable cards
- Each shows: name, duration, price
- Selected state: amber border + amber soft background
- If service was pre-selected from landing page, auto-show it selected

STEP 2 — Pick a slot
- Show today's date by default with left/right arrows to change date
- Generate slots from config.workingHours using config.slotIntervalMinutes
- Each slot is a chip button (2-column grid)
- States:
  a. AVAILABLE — white/grey chip, tappable
  b. SELECTED — amber chip
  c. BOOKED — greyed out, not tappable, shows "Booked" label
  d. PAST — greyed out, not tappable (slots before current time on today)
- Mock 3-4 random slots as already booked per day
- If ALL slots on a selected date are booked → navigate to SlotsUnavailable
  page with the selected service and date passed as props

STEP 3 — Your details
Fields:
- Full name (required, min 2 chars)
- Phone number (required, must be valid Indian mobile: 10 digits, starts with
  6-9, show "+91" prefix as static label)
- Email (optional, validate format if filled)
- Notes/special requests (optional, textarea, max 200 chars)

Validation rules (show inline errors, not alerts):
- Validate on blur (when field loses focus)
- Validate all again on form submit
- Name: required, min 2 chars, no numbers
- Phone: required, exactly 10 digits, starts with 6/7/8/9
- Email: optional, if provided must match standard email regex
- Notes: max 200 chars, show live char count (e.g. "43/200")
- "Confirm Booking" button disabled until name + phone valid
- On submit: call api/bookings.js → createBooking(), show loading spinner
  on button, then navigate to ConfirmationPage

Back button on each step returns to previous step (step 1 goes back to
LandingPage).

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PAGE 3 — CONFIRMATION PAGE (src/pages/ConfirmationPage.jsx)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Show:
- Large animated checkmark (CSS animation, amber color)
- "Booking Confirmed!" heading
- Booking summary card:
  - Service name + price
  - Date and time slot
  - Customer name
  - Phone number
  - Booking ID (mock: "NR-" + random 6-digit number)
- "Add to Calendar" button (generates .ics file download with booking details)
- Divider: "Loved the experience?"
- CTA block (dark card):
  - "Follow @oye.nino on Instagram" button (gradient: amber to pink)
  - Two buttons side by side: "Share on WhatsApp" + "Copy link"
  - Share text: "Just booked {service} at Noir Salon via oye.nino.
    Zero investment mein apna booking site: https://book.oyenino.com"
- "Book another service" link → resets flow and goes back to BookingPage step 1

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PAGE 4 — SLOTS UNAVAILABLE (src/pages/SlotsUnavailable.jsx)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Triggered when all slots on a selected date are booked.

Show:
- Illustration or large emoji (📅)
- "No slots available" heading
- Subtext: "All slots for {service} on {date} are booked."
- Two options:
  a. "Try another date" button → goes back to SlotPicker with same service,
     auto-advance to next available date
  b. "Join waitlist" button → shows a small inline form (name + phone only,
     same validations as booking form), on submit shows
     "You're on the waitlist! We'll notify you if a slot opens."
- "Choose a different service" link → back to step 1

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
API LAYER (src/api/bookings.js)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Export these functions. Each simulates an API call with 800ms delay.
When connecting real backend later, ONLY this file changes.

export async function getAvailableSlots(serviceId, date) {
  // Returns: { slots: [{ time: "10:00", available: true/false }] }
  // Mock: mark 3-4 random slots as unavailable
}

export async function createBooking(payload) {
  // payload: { serviceId, date, time, name, phone, email, notes }
  // Returns: { success: true, bookingId: "NR-XXXXXX" }
  // Mock: always returns success after delay
}

export async function joinWaitlist(payload) {
  // payload: { serviceId, date, name, phone }
  // Returns: { success: true }
  // Mock: always returns success
}

// TODO: Replace mock implementations with:
// const BASE_URL = "https://api.yourdomain.workers.dev";
// return fetch(`${BASE_URL}/slots?...`).then(r => r.json());
// Hono + Cloudflare D1 backend — coming in Episode 3

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
SLOT GENERATION UTIL (src/utils/slots.js)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

export function generateSlots(workingHours, intervalMinutes) {
  // Generate all slot times between start and end
  // e.g. 10:00 to 20:00 with 30min interval →
  // ["10:00", "10:30", "11:00", ... "19:30"]
}

export function isPastSlot(slotTime, date) {
  // Returns true if slot is in the past
  // (only relevant for today's date)
}

export function formatSlotDisplay(time) {

}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
CLOUDFLARE PAGES SETUP
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1. Add a _redirects file in public/ folder:
   /* /index.html 200
   (handles SPA routing on Cloudflare Pages)

2. vite.config.js build output: dist/

3. Add a README section explaining:
   - npm run build → generates dist/
   - Deploy dist/ to Cloudflare Pages
   - Future: wrangler.toml for Workers backend

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
GENERAL RULES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

- Mobile-first. Max width 480px centered on desktop.
- All buttons: min height 44px (thumb-friendly)
- Loading states on every async action (spinner on button, not full screen)
- All prices in ₹ (Indian Rupee symbol)
- All dates in Indian format: "Mon, 27 Jun 2025"
- Currency formatting: ₹599 (no decimals)
- No external UI libraries, no Tailwind, no CSS frameworks
- Every component reads from config.js — hardcoded values are not allowed
- Add // BACKEND: comments wherever real API calls will replace mock data
- Keep components small and single-responsibility
- Use consistent border-radius: 12px for chips, 16px for cards, 50px for
  primary buttons
prompt.tip: Yeh prompt React + Vite mein ek complete salon booking app banata hai. Config file mein apne salon ka naam, services, prices daalo — baaki sab auto-generate hoga. ChatGPT ya Claude mein paste karo, poora project milega.

items.label: Config-driven
items.desc: One config file controls everything — brand, services, prices, working hours

items.label: 4 Pages
items.desc: Landing, Booking (3-step flow), Confirmation with calendar export, Slots Unavailable

items.label: Mock API layer
items.desc: Swap to real Hono + D1 backend later — only one file changes

items.label: Cloudflare ready
items.desc: Static build, deploys to Cloudflare Pages with zero config

steps.text: Prompt copy karo — Claude ya ChatGPT mein paste karo. Config section mein apne salon/business ka details daalo.
Project generate hoga — React + Vite project milega with all files. npm install && npm run dev se run karo.
Config customize karo — src/config.js mein brand name, services, prices, working hours badlo. Poora app update ho jayega.
Deploy karo — npm run build aur dist/ folder Cloudflare Pages pe upload. Booking site live.

cta.title: Aur prompts chahiye? Sab free hai.
cta.subtitle: Shopping website, AI agents, product management — 10+ aur free prompts hain mere paas.
